name: Giraffe Winter Sports Simulator
author: Poki
description: Have you ever seen a giraffe sliding down a ski ramp? In this game you will! The goal is simple, get your giraffe to go as far as it can! That’s easier said than done as your giraffe flies and flips through the air. Want to prove your giraffe has the makings of a champion? Compete with your friends in two players game mode. Controls: Space or mouse click - Fly
